ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow hover preview to trigger when hovering over any type of rendered embed such as images or block references
ast.target: 允许在悬停任何类型的渲染嵌入时触发预览，例如图像或块引用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use hover editor for links to subheadings, instead of the built-in preview/editor
ast.target: 对于链接到子标题的悬停编辑器，请使用内置预览/编辑器而不是悬停编辑器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use hover editor for links to blocks, instead of the built-in preview/editor
ast.target: 对于链接到块的悬停编辑器，请使用内置预览/编辑器而不是悬停编辑器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use hover editor for footnotes, instead of the built-in preview/editor
ast.target: 对于脚注的悬停编辑器，请使用内置预览/编辑器而不是悬停编辑器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the hover editor as the active pane when opened
ast.target: 打开时将悬停编辑器设置为活动面板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When double clicking to minimize, the window will roll down instead of rolling up
ast.target: 双击最小化时，窗口将向下滚动而不是向上滚动

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Quickly arrange popovers by dragging them to the edges of the screen. The left and right edges 
        will maximize the popover vertically. The top edge will maximize the popover to fill the entire 
        screen. Dragging the popovers away from the edges will restore the popver to its original size.
ast.target: 通过拖动它们到屏幕边缘来快速排列气泡视图。左侧和右侧边缘将垂直最大化气泡视图。顶部边缘将使气泡视图充满整个屏幕。从边缘拖出气泡视图将恢复其原始大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Show the view header by default when triggering a hover editor.
         When disabled, view headers will only show if you click the view header icon to the left of the minimize button.
ast.target: 触发悬停编辑器时，默认显示视图标题。禁用后，只有点击最小化按钮左侧的视图标题图标时才会显示视图标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Click and hold an image within a hover editor to temporarily maximize the popover and image to fill the entire viewport. 
        On mouse up, the hover editor will restore to its original size.
ast.target: 在悬停编辑器中点击并按住图像以临时最大化气泡视图和图像使其充满整个视口。松开鼠标后，悬停编辑器将恢复到其原始大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入任何有效的CSS单位

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait before showing a Hover Editor when hovering over a link
ast.target: 在悬停链接上显示悬停编辑器前等待多久

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait before closing a Hover Editor once the mouse leaves
ast.target: 鼠标离开后关闭悬停编辑器前等待多久
